notes.evaluation_unit: Top-level bug recall is evaluated on detect_info_raw, not detect_info.
notes.benchmark_total_bug_hint_definition: Each key variable in juliet_dataset.xlsx details sheet is treated as one real resource-leak bug unit.
notes.tp_bug_definition: At least one raw report matches the benchmark bug unit.
notes.fp_raw_report_definition: A raw report does not match any benchmark bug unit.
notes.merged_issue_count_hint_definition: detect_info may merge multiple raw reports; it is retained only as a reference count.
